overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night, approaching and entering a fortified medieval village with stone walls and torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail between rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the narrow mountain path with swords on his back

entered.detail: Large snow-dusted rock formation bordering the path
Rocky outcrop with sparse snow coverage
Tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the dark sky
Patchy snow and grass on the trail surface
Low stone fortification wall running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow mountain trail flanked by snow-dusted rocky cliffs and pine trees. The path is covered in patchy snow, and a low stone wall becomes visible on the left as the terrain opens slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified village approach with stone walls

events.description: passing a small wooden hut as stone fortifications become prominent
torchlight from the village gate becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues toward the village entrance, passing wooden structures along the path

entered.detail: Small dark wooden shack with sloped roof beside the trail
Large fortified gate with wooden doors and stone pillars
Rough wooden palisade fencing along the right side

segments.scene_description: The path widens as Geralt approaches the village, with stone walls on the left and a wooden hut on the right. The fortified gate looms ahead, illuminated by flickering torchlight, while the rocky terrain gives way to cleared ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: village courtyard with wooden buildings and campfires

events.description: passing through the stone gate into the village interior
ambient illumination increases from multiple campfires and torches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the gate and explores the village courtyard, moving between buildings and fire pits

entered.detail: Stone and timber gate structure with burning wall sconces
Wooden plank walkway bridging the entrance threshold
Large burning fire pit with orange flames
Timber-framed structures with warm interior lighting
Stacked wooden barrels and supply crates
Large canvas tent with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the village through the stone gate, crossing a wooden plank bridge into a courtyard illuminated by campfires. Wooden buildings and supply crates line the path as he moves deeper into the settlement, passing a large canvas tent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, snowy mountain trail into the warm, torchlit interior of a fortified medieval village. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow path flanked by snow-dusted rocky cliffs and pine trees, where a low stone wall first emerges as the terrain opens. As the path widens, the rocky wilderness gives way to cleared ground, leading the camera past a wooden hut toward a looming fortified gate illuminated by flickering torches. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes through the stone gateway and crosses a wooden plank bridge, entering a courtyard brightened by campfires. Finally, the movement carries him deeper into the settlement, passing wooden buildings, supply crates, and a large canvas tent.
